headline: Hologic Goes Private In $18 Billion Blackstone, TPG Acquisition
summary: Blackstone and TPG complete their acquisition of Hologic for up to $79 per share. Hologic transitions to a private company. Read more.

raw.headline: Hologic Goes Private In $18 Billion Blackstone, TPG Acquisition
raw.summary: Blackstone and TPG complete their acquisition of Hologic for up to $79 per share. Hologic transitions to a private company. Read more.

headline: Hologic hires former Baxter leader José Almeida as CEO
summary: The company appointed Almeida as chief executive in conjunction with the completion of an $18.3 billion go-private deal.
